name: Sloppy Joes II
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat vegetable oil in a deep, 3-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole dish in the microwave for 2 minutes.
2. Crumble the meat into hot oil and cook uncovered for 7½ minutes, breaking up the meat particles frequently until all red color has gone out of the meat.
3. Drain off excess fat.
4. Stir in salt, pepper, chili powder, and tomato sauce.
5. Heat uncovered in the microwave for an additional 4 minutes or until heated through.
6. Add frankfurter rounds and heat uncovered for another 4 minutes or until the frankfurters are hot.
7. Spoon the Sloppy Joe mixture over hamburger buns. (Buns may be toasted conventionally if desired.)
